notes: Use Notion MCP first for saved external-signal views.
Keep the repo config as the source of truth for intended filters and layouts.
Use Playwright only if MCP cannot complete a view task cleanly.

views.name: Needs Mapping
views.purpose: Review priority projects that still need real external-source identifiers.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Needs Mapping"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Provider", "Source Type", "Status"; SORT BY "Name" ASC

views.name: Active GitHub
views.purpose: Inspect active GitHub repo mappings used by the polling sync.
views.configure: FILTER "Provider" = "GitHub"; FILTER "Status" = "Active"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Identifier", "Last Synced At"; SORT BY "Last Synced At" DESC

views.name: Active Deployments
views.purpose: Inspect active deployment-source mappings for delivery telemetry.
views.configure: FILTER "Provider" = "Vercel"; FILTER "Status" = "Active"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Identifier", "Environment", "Last Synced At"; SORT BY "Last Synced At" DESC

views.name: Recent Risk Events
views.purpose: Review the newest workflow and deployment signals that carry delivery risk.
views.configure: FILTER "Severity" = "Risk"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Provider", "Signal Type", "Status", "Occurred At"; SORT BY "Occurred At" DESC

views.name: Recent Deployments
views.purpose: Review the newest deployment events across mapped projects.
views.configure: FILTER "Signal Type" = "Deployment"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Status", "Environment", "Occurred At"; SORT BY "Occurred At" DESC

views.name: Recent Workflow Failures
views.purpose: Review recent failed workflow runs that should influence delivery risk.
views.configure: FILTER "Signal Type" = "Workflow Run"; FILTER "Severity" = "Risk"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Status", "Occurred At"; SORT BY "Occurred At" DESC

views.name: By Project
views.purpose: Browse external telemetry by linked local project.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Provider", "Signal Type", "Status", "Occurred At"; SORT BY "Occurred At" DESC

views.name: Latest Runs
views.purpose: Inspect the newest external-signal sync runs and item counts.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Status", "Started At", "Completed At", "Items Written", "Failures"; SORT BY "Started At" DESC

views.name: Failures
views.purpose: Review sync runs that failed or only partially succeeded.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Failed"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Started At", "Failures", "Notes"; SORT BY "Started At" DESC

views.name: History
views.purpose: Review the full sync-run audit history across providers.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Status", "Started At", "Completed At", "Items Seen", "Items Written", "Items Deduped"; SORT BY "Started At" DESC

views.name: Telemetry Coverage
views.purpose: Review which priority projects have useful external telemetry coverage.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "External Signal Coverage", "Latest External Activity", "External Signal Updated"; SORT BY "External Signal Updated" DESC

views.name: Delivery Risk
views.purpose: Surface projects where workflows or deployments are showing elevated delivery risk.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Latest Deployment Status", "Recent Failed Workflow Runs", "Recommendation Lane"; SORT BY "Recent Failed Workflow Runs" DESC
